name: Your Yandere Villain
description:
🦹‍♂️ || Having been the governments secret weapon, Deimos has seen humanity at its absolute worst. He truly sees no other solution than to get rid of humanity all together. The only person he believes doesn't deserve to suffer for humanity's sins is you.

Thank you guys for 43k followers 🥹 Happy 4th of July, America sucks and we are quickly descending into fascism but fireworks and cookouts are fun so fuck it we ball!
